rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference visible ports or features.
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for constants and equations.
generic_rules: Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts.
Only include assumptions and guarantees with concrete bounds or named constants in component type annexes.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Constants and equations in AGREE must declare their types explicitly.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type annexes unless represented through valid variables.
Do not generate range comparisons or 0/1 equality checks on Boolean or opaque data ports without clear scalar representation.
